title: Draft Gherkin for configuration behaviors

custom.beads_notes: Added cross-implementation Gherkin draft in features/configuration/configuration_standardization.feature covering: single taskulus.yml load, missing file error, unknown fields, fixed hierarchy, workflow binding requirement, transition validation, priority import/alias enforcement, dotenv/env precedence matching Python dotyaml.
